name: ccflux
description: Per-turn token usage telemetry for Claude Code. Sends usage metadata to your organisation's self-hosted receiver — no message content is ever collected.

api_endpoint.title: Receiver endpoint
api_endpoint.description: Your organisation's ccflux receiver URL, e.g. https://ccflux.example.org/report

api_token.title: API token
api_token.description: Your personal token, provisioned by your IT team
